title: Quetzalcoatlus soaring over Volcanoes Coloring Page

seoDescription: Giant Quetzalcoatlus pterosaur soaring high over a landscape of active volcanoes. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Quetzalcoatlus was a pterosaur from the Late Cretaceous and one of the largest flying creatures to ever exist, with a wingspan of 36 feet (11 meters).
It was as tall as a modern giraffe when standing on the ground and is believed to have hunted small prey on foot like a stork.
It was named after Quetzalcoatl, the feathered serpent god of Aztec mythology.
